series_metadata.series_description: Information submitted by vendors regarding filing systems for purchase. Includes current filing system purchased and installation information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: NOT CONTRACTED: In office 2 years; then destroy. CONTRACTED: In office 3 years after contract expires; then destroy. ; Electronic: NOT CONTRACTED: In office 2 years; then destroy. CONTRACTED: In office 3 years after contract expires; then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
